name: hermes_agent_core_capability
description: وكيل سيادي مستقل مولد تلقائياً للقيام بـ: Ability to intelligently parse, complete (if necessary), and integrate complex or new function logic provided as high-level programming language code snippets (e.g., Python functions) into existing source files by generating precise and executable modification commands (e.g., advanced `sed` patterns, dedicated code generation/insertion tools, or direct file manipulation logic within a script) as requested for the AI fallback mechanism.
